species: Here we report the characterization and anti-tumor function of EVs isolated from NK3.3 cells...
cell_type: Natural killer (NK) cells are critical mediators of immune function...
disease_state: NK3.3 EVs inhibit proliferation and induce caspase-mediated apoptosis and cell death of an array of both hematopoietic and non-hematopoietic tumor cell lines.
